title: Grading Consistency Audit
summary: Use this probe page to compare grading behavior across prompts, runs, and rubric interpretations so inconsistency becomes visible.

sections.title: Stability checks
sections.body: Inspect variation across repeated grading scenarios and identify where judgments drift or collapse.

sections.title: Evaluation set
sections.body: Add submissions, rubric criteria, comparison conditions, and the consistency thresholds that matter.

highlights.label: Best for
highlights.value: Rubric reliability, grading QA, and calibration exercises.

highlights.label: Output shape
highlights.value: Variance reports, disagreement patterns, and audit summaries.
